text:
Created attachment 234285
Patch from 0.7.5 to 0.8.3

devel/ros-rosdistro update 0.7.5 -> 0.8.3
    
    No changelog is available, browsing the repo history, changes seem to
    be fixes for Docutils, UTF-8 encoding fixes, and support for tar
    sources and releases of ROS.
